explanations.6: depends_on tells Docker that the joomla service needs the joomladb service to be running before it starts.
explanations.10: condition: service_healthy means Docker will wait until joomladb passes its health check before starting joomla, not just wait for the container to exist.
explanations.15: healthcheck defines a test that Docker runs periodically to confirm the database is actually working and ready to accept connections.
